# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    port 1/1/c1/1 {
        admin-state bogus-state
    }
    policy-options {
        policy-statement "p" {
            entry 10 {
                action {
                    action-type bogus-action
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
    }
}
